race.comment: EXCESSOR (5) justified the short price ($1.22 fav), with an effortless Maiden victory at his second start over 1200m at Tamworth. Can overcome the wide gate and measure up again. COOL AZ ALETTA (8) due for a change of luck at his fifth run in after he closed quickly for an unlucky head third over 1250m at Taree. Will go back from the draw and relish the fast tempo. Respect. HE'S COOL (3) stalked the speed second-up in the small field with a dominant Super Maiden win over 1100m at Wyong. Tougher task this time but sure to be thereabouts. ZOUCRATIC (1) resumes without a trial. Raced flat when sixth over 1400m at Newcastle Last November. Lugging bit comes off and gets map favours. The chances don't end there.
